name: Axis Bank My Zone Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under My Zone Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 EDGE REWARD Points on annual spends of Rs 1.5 lakh for eligible customers onboarded from 1 April 2025
SonyLIV Premium membership renewal on spending Rs 1.5 lakh in a card anniversary year for eligible paid-card customers onboarded before 31 March 2025
additionalBenefits: Currently listed as nil joining and nil annual fee for Mastercard network on Axis official catalogue
Standard product fee page lists Rs 500 joining fee and Rs 500 annual fee
SonyLIV Premium annual subscription worth Rs 1,499 on first purchase within 30 days of issuance
Buy one get one movie ticket on District app, capped at Rs 200 per month
Flat Rs 120 off on Swiggy food delivery twice per month on minimum order value of Rs 500
AJIO discount offers including up to Rs 1,000 off on eligible purchases
4 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on eligible spends
Complimentary domestic airport lounge access, listed as 4 visits per year on Axis catalogue
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India or NRI
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India or NRI
